title: Aquamarine
description: This mod add new and unique Aquamarine armor, tools and biome!
body: Dive into the depths of adventure with the Aquamarine Mod! Explore a stunning new Aquamarine Biome filled with unique flora and fauna. Craft powerful Aquamarine tools and armor to survive and thrive in this vibrant, ocean-inspired world. Perfect for explorers, builders, and adventurers seeking a fresh, enchanting Minecraft experience.
